infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TraiMate needs camera access to capture travel journal photos and scan booking documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TraiMate needs photo library access to add photos to your travel journal.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TraiMate saves captured photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TraiMate uses your location to show nearby places and weather at your destination.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: TraiMate uses Face ID to protect your travel documents and personal data.

plugins.cameraPermission: TraiMate needs camera access to capture travel journal photos and scan booking documents.
